module_info.docstring: Validation pipeline — validates citations and filters stale entries.

classes.name: ValidationResult
classes.docstring: Result of validating a set of entries.

classes.name: PromotedEntryReport
classes.docstring: Report for a single promoted entry's validation status.

classes.name: SweepResult
classes.docstring: Result of a full sweep across all entries.

functions.name: validate_and_filter_entries
functions.docstring:
Validate citations for entries, update metadata, filter stale entries.

Wraps the full operation in a transaction for crash safety.

functions.name: apply_decay_penalty
functions.docstring:
Apply time-based decay to confidence. Separate from compute_confidence (stays pure).

Grace period: first 14 days, no decay.
After 14 days: -0.1 per additional 14-day period.
  - Days 15-28: -0.1
  - Days 29-42: -0.2
  - Days 43-56: -0.3
Clamp to [0.0, 1.0].

functions.name: _revalidate_citations
functions.docstring: Re-validate citations for an entry using DB-stored citation data.

functions.name: sweep_all_entries
functions.docstring:
Re-validate all entries: recheck citations, apply decay, update stale_streak.

Includes journal crash recovery and demotion candidate collection.

functions.name: _extract_promoted_entries
functions.docstring: Extract entries from a target doc that have the intermem marker.

functions.name: validate_promoted
functions.docstring:
Validate already-promoted entries in target docs.

Scans for entries with <!-- intermem --> markers, validates their citations,
and returns a report.
